acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux `just check` runs ShellCheck over repository shell scripts including `nix/direct-capture-preflight.sh`.
macOS behavior remains native and explicitly skips ShellCheck only when the tool is unavailable outside Linux/Nix.
Engineering docs and command surface remain aligned.
Evidence records focused ShellCheck and full repo check commands.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository hygiene command change only; `nix develop -c shellcheck nix/direct-capture-preflight.sh` and `nix develop -c just check` passed.
